caption: The video shows a computer screen displaying the IRS website, specifically the "News Releases for Current Month" page. The top of the screen features the IRS logo and navigation options such as "SEARCH," "HELP," and "MENU." The main content area prominently displays the title "News Releases for Current Month" in large, bold text. The cursor is visible on the right side of the screen, indicating that the user is navigating the page. The taskbar at the bottom of the screen shows various application icons and the current time as 2:20 PM on August 5, 2022, with the weather noted as 92°F and sunny. The video appears to be a static shot of the webpage without any significant changes or actions taking place.
